# PsiQuantum Announces Omega, a Manufacturable Chipset for Photonic Quantum Computing
[Company](https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import/category/Company)
26 Feb
Written By [Alex Mack](https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import?author=65f1c96c4cdc7b6827bb80b8)
_20 years since the first photonic qubit breakthroughs, PsiQuantum has unveiled mass-manufacturable chips purpose-built for utility-scale, million-qubit quantum computers._
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/1740547060014-W3BT6O9VKUSORUVH1TN8/Omega3.jpg)
[ Read on Nature ](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-08820-7)
[ Read on arXiv ](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.17570)
[ Learn More About Omega ](https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import/introducing-omega)
[ Omega Imagery ](https://app.box.com/s/u8ivz16pevqizc5z06ljeicagpq009in)
PALO ALTO, Calif. – [FEBRUARY 26, 2025] – PsiQuantum today announces Omega, a quantum photonic chipset purpose-built for utility-scale quantum computing. Featured in a newly published paper in[ _Nature_](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-08820-7), the chipset contains all the advanced components required to build million-qubit-scale quantum computers and deliver on the profoundly world-changing promise of this technology _._ Every photonic component is demonstrated with beyond-state-of-the-art performance. The paper shows high-fidelity qubit operations, and a simple, long-range chip-to-chip qubit interconnect – a key enabler to scale that has remained challenging for other technologies. The chips are made in a high-volume semiconductor fab, representing a new level of technical maturity and scale in a field that is often thought of as being confined to research labs. PsiQuantum will break ground this year on two datacenter-sized Quantum Compute Centers in Brisbane, Australia and Chicago, Illinois.
> “For more than 25 years it has been my conviction that in order for us to realize a useful quantum computer in my lifetime, we must find a way to fully leverage the unmatched capabilities of the semiconductor industry. This paper vindicates that belief.”
— Prof. Jeremy O’Brien, PsiQuantum Co-founder & CEO. 
Designed by PsiQuantum and manufactured at GlobalFoundries in New York, the new chipset integrates these advances into high-volume, industrially-proven processes – ready for large-scale systems integration. PsiQuantum’s approach is based on using single photons – particles of light – which are then manipulated using silicon photonic chip technology originally developed for telecom and datacenter networking applications. For quantum applications, the company had to improve performance well beyond the state-of-the-art, and introduced new materials into the fab, including a superconducting material used for highly efficient single-photon detection, and Barium Titanate (BTO), an advanced material for low-loss, high speed optical switching which is developed and produced by PsiQuantum in San Jose, California. The company also had to overcome challenges with background noise and low-temperature operation of the chip to demonstrate the circuit performance detailed in the paper – PsiQuantum’s latest measurements include 99.98% single-qubit state preparation and measurement fidelity, 99.5% two-photon quantum interference visibility, and 99.72% chip-to-chip quantum interconnect fidelity. 
PsiQuantum’s founding team performed the world’s first lab demonstration of a two-qubit logic gate using single photons in Brisbane, Australia over 20 years ago, invented integrated quantum photonics and ‘fusion-based’ quantum computing, and [made a prototype quantum processor available via the cloud](https://www.bristol.ac.uk/news/2013/9720.html) in 2013. Since then, the team has focused exclusively on the scaling, performance and manufacturing challenges associated with building million-qubit-scale systems essential for commercially valuable applications. 
View fullsize
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/397d1a20-4999-4dbb-b345-07f7fd062cb5/OmegaLayout-TransparentBackground.jpg)
PsiQuantum has also introduced an entirely new cooling solution for quantum computers—eliminating the iconic “chandelier” dilution refrigerator in favor of a simpler, more powerful, and more manufacturable cuboid design, closer to a datacenter server rack. The _Nature_ paper shares some details on this new approach to cooling, which is now deployed at PsiQuantum’s UK facility and was used for many of the performance results described.
Thanks to these advancements, PsiQuantum now has the technology to manufacture and cool vast numbers of quantum chips. While the company must continue to improve the performance, integration and yield of the devices, there is no “next step” in terms of manufacturing maturity — GlobalFoundries is a “tier-1” fab. PsiQuantum has characterized millions of devices on thousands of wafers and currently performs around half a million measurements each month.
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/df4288ee-84b1-4bf2-ba47-6f5e8a8826a3/PsiCube+%281%29.jpg)
PsiQuantum’s first modular, cuboid, cooling solution at Daresbury STFC.
PsiQuantum’s focus is now on wiring these chips together across racks, into increasingly large-scale multi-chip systems – work the company is now expanding through its partnership with the [U.S. Department of Energy at SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory](https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import/psiquantum-partners-with-us-department-of-energys-slac-national-accelerator-laboratory-to-access-state-of-the-art-high-powered-cryogenic-cooling-capabilities-for-large-scale-quantum-computing) in Menlo Park, California as well as a new manufacturing and testing facility in Silicon Valley. While chip-to-chip networking remains a hard research problem for many other approaches, photonic quantum computers have the intrinsic advantage that photonic qubits can be networked using standard telecom optical fiber without any conversion between modalities, and PsiQuantum has already demonstrated high-fidelity quantum interconnects over distances up to 250m.
In 2024, PsiQuantum announced two landmark partnerships with the [Australian Federal and Queensland State governments](https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import/psiquantum-to-build-worlds-first-utility-scale-fault-tolerant-quantum-computer-in-australia), as well as [the State of Illinois and the City of Chicago](https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import/illinois-iqmp), to build its first utility-scale quantum computers in Brisbane and Chicago. Recognizing quantum as a sovereign capability, these partnerships underscore the urgency and race towards building million-qubit systems. Later this year, PsiQuantum will break ground on Quantum Compute Centers at both sites, where the first utility-scale, million-qubit systems will be deployed.
> “Semiconductor manufacturing will inevitably be a large part of any solution to building quantum computers at scale. At GlobalFoundries, we know the immense challenge of engineering advanced devices with this level of rigor at scale, and we’ve been consistently impressed by PsiQuantum’s expertise and progress. Our partnership combines GlobalFoundries’ world-class photonics manufacturing with PsiQuantum’s advanced capability in photonic quantum computing, and the results so far have been remarkable. We look forward to pushing these boundaries even further as we work toward large-scale quantum systems.”
— Dr. Thomas Caulfield, President and CEO of GlobalFoundries
> “Omega moves us beyond a science project,” said Pete Shadbolt, PsiQuantum Co-founder & Chief Scientific Officer. “Before we started PsiQuantum, my cofounders and I were in a university lab playing around with a couple of qubits but we knew then that the platform we were using was sorely deficient – we knew that we needed millions of qubits and we knew that implied getting into a mature fab, integration of unlikely components together into a single platform, and climbing a performance curve that at the time seemed borderline impossible. It has been amazing to see how the team has executed on those plans from a decade ago, and it is tremendously exciting to now have the technology in our hands that we will use to build the first commercially useful systems.”
— Pete Shadbolt, PsiQuantum Co-founder & Chief Scientific Officer
> “What sets us apart is the manufacturability and connectivity of our hardware,” said Professor Mark Thompson, PsiQuantum Co-founder & Chief Technologist. “Our technology is manufactured in a high-volume semiconductor fab that normally produces chips for cell phones and laptops, and now yields the world’s highest-performance photonic qubits. We can also seamlessly connect our chips together using conventional optical fibers, allowing us to rapidly scale-up our systems to deliver truly powerful quantum computers.””
— Prof. Mark Thompson, PsiQuantum Co-founder & Chief Technologist

      <script>
        const activeClassNameSoftwareSlider1 = 'software-slider1-active';
        let currentSlideIndexSoftwareSlider1 = 0;

        function renderSoftwareSlider1(index, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl) {
            allSlideItems.forEach(item => {
                item.classList.remove(activeClassNameSoftwareSlider1);
            });

            const targetSlideElement = allSlideItems[index];

            if (targetSlideElement) {
                targetSlideElement.classList.add(activeClassNameSoftwareSlider1);
            }
            updateActivePillSoftwareSlider1(index, paginationContainerEl);
        }
        
        function createPaginationSoftwareSlider1(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems) {
            allSlideItems.forEach((slideItem, index) => {
                const pillText = slideItem.dataset.pillText || `Slide ${index + 1}`;
                const pill = document.createElement('div');
                pill.classList.add('software-slider1-pill');
                pill.dataset.index = index; 
                
                const pillTextSpan = document.createElement('span');
                pillTextSpan.textContent = pillText;
                pill.appendChild(pillTextSpan);
                
                paginationContainerEl.appendChild(pill); 

                pill.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    if (currentSlideIndexSoftwareSlider1 !== index) { 
                        currentSlideIndexSoftwareSlider1 = index;
                        renderSoftwareSlider1(currentSlideIndexSoftwareSlider1, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl);
                    }
                });
            });
        }

        function updateActivePillSoftwareSlider1(activeIndex, paginationContainerEl) {
            const pills = paginationContainerEl.querySelectorAll('.software-slider1-pill');
            pills.forEach((pill, index) => {
                pill.classList.toggle(activeClassNameSoftwareSlider1, index === activeIndex);
            });
        }

        function initSoftwareSlider1() {
            const paginationContainerEl = document.getElementById('softwareSlider1PaginationContainer');
            const allSlidesWrapperEl = document.getElementById('softwareSlider1AllSlidesWrapper');

            if (!paginationContainerEl || !allSlidesWrapperEl) {
                console.warn('Software Slider 1: Essential container elements not found. Slider not initialized.');
                return;
            }
            
            const allSlideItems = allSlidesWrapperEl.querySelectorAll('.software-slider1-item');

            if (!allSlideItems.length) {
                 console.warn('Software Slider 1: No slide items found. Slider not initialized.');
                return;
            }

            createPaginationSoftwareSlider1(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems);
            renderSoftwareSlider1(currentSlideIndexSoftwareSlider1, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl); 
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initSoftwareSlider1);
        } else {
            initSoftwareSlider1();
        }
    </script>

    <script>
    (function() { 
        let sliderContentEl, sliderTrackEl, paginationActiveBarEl, paginationSegmentsClickable;
        let actualPagesCount = 0; 
        let currentPageIndex = 0; 
        let currentTrackIndex = 1; 
        let isDragging = false;
        let startX, currentX, initialTrackX = 0;
        const dragThreshold = 50; 
        
        function getSliderWidth() {
            if (!sliderContentEl) { 
                return 0;
            }
            return sliderContentEl.offsetWidth; 
        }

        function setupSlider() {
            sliderContentEl = document.getElementById('single-image-caption-slider-content');
            sliderTrackEl = document.getElementById('single-image-caption-slider-track');
            paginationActiveBarEl = document.getElementById('single-image-caption-slider-pagination-active-bar');
            paginationSegmentsClickable = document.querySelectorAll('.single-image-caption-slider-pagination-segment-clickable');

            if (!sliderContentEl || !sliderTrackEl ) {
                return;
            }
            
            const initialItemElements = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.single-image-caption-slider-item-container');

            if (initialItemElements.length === 0) {
                sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 
                actualPagesCount = 0;
                updatePagination(); 
                return; 
            }
            
            const initialItemsHTML = [];
            initialItemElements.forEach(itemEl => {
                initialItemsHTML.push(itemEl.outerHTML);
            });

            sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 

            const dataForSlider = initialItemsHTML.map(itemHTML => [itemHTML]); 
            actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; 
            
            if (actualPagesCount === 0) { 
                 updatePagination();
                 return; 
            }

            const slidesToRender = [
                dataForSlider[actualPagesCount - 1], 
                ...dataForSlider,                    
                dataForSlider[0]                     
            ];
            
            const sliderPageWidth = getSliderWidth(); 

            slidesToRender.forEach((pageDataItemsHTML, index) => { 
                if (!pageDataItemsHTML || pageDataItemsHTML.length === 0) { 
                    return; 
                }
                const pageElement = document.createElement('div');
                pageElement.className = 'single-image-caption-slider-page'; 
                pageElement.style.width = `${sliderPageWidth}px`; 
                pageElement.innerHTML = pageDataItemsHTML.join(''); 
                sliderTrackEl.appendChild(pageElement);
            });
            
            currentPageIndex = 0; 
            currentTrackIndex = 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, false); 
            updatePagination(); 
            sliderContentEl.classList.add('single-image-caption-slider-initialized');
            
            attachEventListeners();
        }
        
        function goToTrackIndex(trackIndex, animate = true) {
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = animate ? 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out' : 'none';
            const targetX = -trackIndex * getSliderWidth();
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${targetX}px)`;
            currentTrackIndex = trackIndex; 
        }

        function handleInfiniteLoop() {
            let targetRealPageIndex;

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = actualPagesCount - 1;
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = 0;
            } else { 
                targetRealPageIndex = currentTrackIndex - 1;
            }

            currentPageIndex = targetRealPageIndex; 
            updatePagination(); 

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) {
                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false); 
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            }
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) { 
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return; 
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return; 
            
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true); 
        }

        function updatePagination() {
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 || !paginationActiveBarEl) return; 
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount; 
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100; 
            
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none'; 
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.add('single-image-caption-slider-dragging'); 
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || !sliderTrackEl) return; 
            e.preventDefault(); 
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`; 
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.remove('single-image-caption-slider-dragging'); 
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out'; 

            const diffX = currentX - startX;

            if (Math.abs(diffX) > dragThreshold) { 
                if (diffX < 0) { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + 1, true);
                } else { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex - 1, true);
                }
            } else { 
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function attachEventListeners() {
            if (sliderTrackEl) { 
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);
            }

            if (sliderContentEl) { 
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
            }
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { 
                if (isDragging) handleDragEnd();
            });
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);

            if (paginationSegmentsClickable && paginationSegmentsClickable.length > 0) {
                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.replaceWith(segment.cloneNode(true)); 
                });
                document.querySelectorAll('.single-image-caption-slider-pagination-segment-clickable').forEach(segment => {
                     segment.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const segmentIndex = parseInt(segment.dataset.pageSegment);
                        let pageIndexToNavigate;
                        if (actualPagesCount === 1) {
                            pageIndexToNavigate = 0;
                        } else if (actualPagesCount === 2) { 
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0;
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = 1; 
                        } else { 
                           if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                           else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.max(0, Math.min(actualPagesCount - 1, Math.floor((actualPagesCount -1) / 2) )); 
                           else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount -1; 
                        }
                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);
                    });
                });
            }
            
            window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize); 
            window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize); 
        }

        function handleResize() {
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.single-image-caption-slider-page'); 
            const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
            pages.forEach(page => {
                page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
            });
            goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
            updatePagination(); 
        }

        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })(); 
    </script>  
  
    <script>
    (function() { 
        let sliderContentEl, sliderTrackEl, paginationActiveBarEl, paginationSegmentsClickable;
        let actualPagesCount = 0; 
        let currentPageIndex = 0; 
        let currentTrackIndex = 1; 
        let isDragging = false;
        let startX, currentX, initialTrackX = 0;
        const dragThreshold = 50; 
        const MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 640; 
        let previousIsMobile = isMobileView();

        function isMobileView() {
            return window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT;
        }

            });

                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.replaceWith(segment.cloneNode(true));

                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.floor((actualPagesCount -1) / 2);

                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0;

                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);

                 console.warn("SquareImageSlider: Nenhum segmento de paginação clicável encontrado.");
            }

            console.log("SquareImageSlider: Event listeners anexados.");
        }

        function handleResize() {
             const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
            if (currentIsMobile !== previousIsMobile) {

                setupSlider();

                if (!sliderTrackEl) return;

                pages.forEach(page => {
                    page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
                });

            }

        (function() {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.career-quote-slide');
                const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.career-pagination-dot');
                let currentSlideIndex = 0;

                if (slides.length === 0 || dots.length === 0 || slides.length !== dots.length) {
                    console.error("Career Quote slider: Number of slides and pagination dots do not match or elements not found.");

                }

                function showSlide(index) {
                    if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) return;

                    slides[currentSlideIndex].classList.remove('career-active-quote');
                    dots[currentSlideIndex].classList.remove('active');

                    slides[index].classList.add('career-active-quote');
                    dots[index].classList.add('active');

                    currentSlideIndex = index;
                }

                dots.forEach(dot => {
                    dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const targetIndex = parseInt(dot.getAttribute('data-slide-target'), 10);
                        showSlide(targetIndex);
                    });
                });

                if (slides.length > 0) {
                    showSlide(0);
                }
            });
        })();

            console.log(`ApplicationPageSlider1: Configuração concluída. Páginas lógicas: ${actualPagesCount}`);
            
            attachEventListeners();
        }

            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = animate ? 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out' : 'none';
            const targetX = -trackIndex * getSliderWidth();
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${targetX}px)`;
            currentTrackIndex = trackIndex; 
        }

        function handleInfiniteLoop() {
            let targetRealPageIndex;

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = actualPagesCount - 1;
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = 0;
            } else { 
                targetRealPageIndex = currentTrackIndex - 1;
            }

            currentPageIndex = targetRealPageIndex; 
            updatePagination(); 

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) {
                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false); 
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            }
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) { 
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return; 
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return; 
            
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true); 
        }

        function updatePagination() {
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 || !paginationActiveBarEl) return; 
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount; 
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100; 
            
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none'; 
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.add('application-page-slider-1-dragging'); 
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || !sliderTrackEl) return; 
            e.preventDefault(); 
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`; 
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.remove('application-page-slider-1-dragging'); 
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out'; 

            const diffX = currentX - startX;

            if (Math.abs(diffX) > dragThreshold) { 
                if (diffX < 0) { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + 1, true);
                } else { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex - 1, true);
                }
            } else { 
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function attachEventListeners() {
            console.log("ApplicationPageSlider1: Anexando event listeners.");
            if (sliderTrackEl) { 
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);
            } else {
                console.error("ApplicationPageSlider1: Não foi possível anexar 'transitionend'.");
            }

            if (sliderContentEl) { 
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
            } else {
                 console.error("ApplicationPageSlider1: Não foi possível anexar listeners de drag.");
            }
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { 
                if (isDragging) handleDragEnd();
            });
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);

            if (paginationSegmentsClickable && paginationSegmentsClickable.length > 0) {
                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.replaceWith(segment.cloneNode(true)); 
                });
                document.querySelectorAll('.application-page-slider-1-pagination-segment-clickable').forEach(segment => {
                     segment.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const segmentIndex = parseInt(segment.dataset.pageSegment);
                        let pageIndexToNavigate;

                        if (isMobileView()) { 
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.floor((actualPagesCount -1) / 2); 
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount - 1; 
                        } else { 
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.max(0, Math.min(actualPagesCount - 1, Math.floor((actualPagesCount -1) / 2) )); // Middle page for desktop
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount -1; 
                        }
                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);
                    });
                });

            } else {
                 console.warn("ApplicationPageSlider1: Nenhum segmento de paginação clicável encontrado.");
            }
            
            window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize); 
            window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize); 
            console.log("ApplicationPageSlider1: Event listeners anexados.");
        }

        function handleResize() {
             const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
            if (currentIsMobile !== previousIsMobile) {
                console.log("ApplicationPageSlider1: Mudança de visualização detectada, reconfigurando.");

            } else {
                if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
                const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.application-page-slider-1-page'); 
                const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
                pages.forEach(page => {
                    page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
                });
                goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
                updatePagination(); 
            }
        }

        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })();

    <script>
        const activeClassNameSlider2 = 'blueprint-slider2-slide-active';
        const activeImageClassName = 'blueprint-slider2-slide-gallery-image-active';
        const activeDotClassName = 'blueprint-slider2-slide-active-dot';
        let currentSlideIndexSlider2 = 0;

        function setupImageGallery(slideItemElement) {
            const galleryWrapper = slideItemElement.querySelector('.blueprint-slider2-slide-image-gallery-wrapper');
            const dotsContainer = slideItemElement.querySelector('.blueprint-slider2-slide-image-dots');
            const images = galleryWrapper.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-slide-content-image');
            
            dotsContainer.innerHTML = ''; // Clear previous dots

            if (images.length <= 1) { // No dots needed for 0 or 1 image
                if (images.length === 1) images[0].classList.add(activeImageClassName);
                return;
            }

            images.forEach((img, index) => {
                img.classList.remove(activeImageClassName); // Reset all images
                if (index === 0) {
                    img.classList.add(activeImageClassName); // Activate first image
                }

                const dot = document.createElement('span');
                dot.classList.add('blueprint-slider2-slide-image-dot');
                dot.dataset.imageIndex = index;
                if (index === 0) {
                    dot.classList.add(activeDotClassName);
                }
                dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    setActiveImage(galleryWrapper, dotsContainer, index);
                });
                dotsContainer.appendChild(dot);
            });
        }

        function setActiveImage(galleryWrapper, dotsContainer, imageIndex) {
            const images = galleryWrapper.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-slide-content-image');
            const dots = dotsContainer.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-slide-image-dot');

            images.forEach((img, idx) => {
                img.classList.toggle(activeImageClassName, idx === imageIndex);
            });
            dots.forEach((dot, idx) => {
                dot.classList.toggle(activeDotClassName, idx === imageIndex);
            });
        }

        function renderSlideSlider2(index, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl) {
            allSlideItems.forEach(item => {
                item.classList.remove(activeClassNameSlider2);
            });

            const targetSlideElement = allSlideItems[index];

            if (targetSlideElement) {
                targetSlideElement.classList.add(activeClassNameSlider2);
                setupImageGallery(targetSlideElement);
            }
            updateActivePillSlider2(index, paginationContainerEl);
        }
        
        function createPaginationSlider2(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems) {
            let maxWidth = 0;
            const tempPills = []; 

            allSlideItems.forEach((slideItem, index) => {
                const pillText = slideItem.dataset.pillText || `Slide ${index + 1}`;
                const pill = document.createElement('div');
                pill.classList.add('blueprint-slider2-slide-pill');
                pill.dataset.index = index; 
                
                const pillTextSpan = document.createElement('span');
                pillTextSpan.textContent = pillText;
                pill.appendChild(pillTextSpan);
                
                paginationContainerEl.appendChild(pill); 
                if (pill.offsetWidth > maxWidth) {
                    maxWidth = pill.offsetWidth;
                }
                tempPills.push(pill); 

                pill.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    if (currentSlideIndexSlider2 !== index) { 
                        currentSlideIndexSlider2 = index;
                        renderSlideSlider2(currentSlideIndexSlider2, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl);
                    }
                });
            });

            tempPills.forEach(pill => {
                pill.style.minWidth = `${maxWidth}px`;
            });
        }

        function updateActivePillSlider2(activeIndex, paginationContainerEl) {
            const pills = paginationContainerEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-slide-pill');
            pills.forEach((pill, index) => {
                pill.classList.toggle(activeClassNameSlider2, index === activeIndex);
            });
        }

        function initSlider2() {
            const paginationContainerEl = document.getElementById('blueprintSlider2PaginationContainer');
            const allSlidesWrapperEl = document.getElementById('blueprintSlider2AllSlidesWrapper');

            if (!paginationContainerEl || !allSlidesWrapperEl) {
                console.warn('Blueprint Slider 2: Essential container elements not found. Slider not initialized.');
                return;
            }
            
            const allSlideItems = allSlidesWrapperEl.querySelectorAll('.blueprint-slider2-slide-item');

            if (!allSlideItems.length) {
                 console.warn('Blueprint Slider 2: No slide items found. Slider not initialized.');
                return;
            }

            createPaginationSlider2(paginationContainerEl, allSlideItems);
            renderSlideSlider2(currentSlideIndexSlider2, allSlideItems, paginationContainerEl); 
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initSlider2);
        } else {
            initSlider2();
        }
    </script>

            });

        });

            return window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT;
        }
        
        function getSliderWidth() {
            // sliderContentEl é definido dentro de setupSlider
            if (!sliderContentEl) { 
                console.error("AboutPageSlider: getSliderWidth - sliderContentEl não está definido ainda (chamado antes do setup ou elemento não encontrado).");
                return 0;
            }
            return sliderContentEl.offsetWidth; 
        }

        function setupSlider() {
            console.log("AboutPageSlider: Iniciando setupSlider."); 

            // Seleção de elementos movida para DENTRO do setupSlider
            sliderContentEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-content');
            sliderTrackEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-track');
            paginationActiveBarEl = document.getElementById('about-page-pagination-active-bar');
            paginationSegmentsClickable = document.querySelectorAll('.about-page-pagination-segment-clickable');

            if (!sliderContentEl) {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider: Elemento #about-page-slider-content não encontrado. Abortando setup.");
                return;
            }
            if (!sliderTrackEl) {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider: Elemento #about-page-slider-track não encontrado. Abortando setup.");
                return;
            }
            if (!paginationActiveBarEl) {
                console.warn("AboutPageSlider: Elemento #about-page-pagination-active-bar não encontrado. Paginação visual não funcionará.");
            }
             if (paginationSegmentsClickable.length !== 3) {
                console.warn(`AboutPageSlider: Esperava 3 .about-page-pagination-segment-clickable, encontrou ${paginationSegmentsClickable.length}. Cliques na paginação podem não funcionar como esperado.`);
            }
            
            const initialItemElements = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-item-container');
            console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Encontrados ${initialItemElements.length} itens (.about-page-slider-item-container) no HTML.`);

            if (initialItemElements.length === 0) {
                console.warn("AboutPageSlider: Nenhum item encontrado no HTML do track. O slider ficará vazio.");
                sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 
                actualPagesCount = 0;
                updatePagination(); 
                return; 
            }
            
            const initialItemsHTML = [];
            initialItemElements.forEach(itemEl => {
                initialItemsHTML.push(itemEl.outerHTML);
            });

            sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 

            const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
            let dataForSlider; 
            
            if (currentIsMobile) {
                dataForSlider = initialItemsHTML.map(itemHTML => [itemHTML]); 
                actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; 
                console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Visualização Mobile. Número de páginas (itens): ${actualPagesCount}`);
            } else {
                dataForSlider = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < initialItemsHTML.length; i += 3) {
                    dataForSlider.push(initialItemsHTML.slice(i, i + 3)); 
                }
                actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; 
                console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Visualização Desktop. Número de páginas (grupos de 3): ${actualPagesCount}`);
            }
            
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 && initialItemsHTML.length > 0 ) { 
                 console.warn("AboutPageSlider: actualPagesCount é 0 após processar os itens. Verifique a lógica de agrupamento ou o número de itens HTML. O slider ficará vazio.");
                 updatePagination();
                 return; 
            } else if (actualPagesCount === 0 && initialItemsHTML.length === 0) {
                 console.log("AboutPageSlider: Nenhum item para processar, slider permanecerá vazio.");
                 updatePagination();
                 return;
            }


            const slidesToRender = [
                dataForSlider[actualPagesCount - 1], 
                ...dataForSlider,                    
                dataForSlider[0]                     
            ];
            
            const sliderPageWidth = getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderPageWidth === 0) {
                console.warn("AboutPageSlider: getSliderWidth() retornou 0. sliderContentEl pode não estar visível/renderizado com largura. As páginas do Slider terão largura 0.");
            }

            slidesToRender.forEach((pageDataItemsHTML, index) => { 
                if (!pageDataItemsHTML || pageDataItemsHTML.length === 0) { 
                    console.warn(`AboutPageSlider: Tentando renderizar uma página vazia ou indefinida no índice do track ${index}. Isso pode ocorrer se 'dataForSlider' estiver malformado para os clones.`);
                    return; 
                }
                const pageElement = document.createElement('div');
                pageElement.className = 'about-page-slider-page'; 
                pageElement.style.width = `${sliderPageWidth}px`; 
                pageElement.innerHTML = pageDataItemsHTML.join(''); 
                sliderTrackEl.appendChild(pageElement);
            });
            
            currentPageIndex = 0; 
            currentTrackIndex = 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, false); 
            updatePagination(); 
            previousIsMobile = currentIsMobile; 
            sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-initialized');
            console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Configuração do slider concluída. Páginas lógicas: ${actualPagesCount}, Track Index inicial: ${currentTrackIndex}`);
            
            // Atribuição de event listeners DEPOIS que os elementos são confirmados
            attachEventListeners();
        }
        
        function goToTrackIndex(trackIndex, animate = true) {
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = animate ? 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out' : 'none';
            const targetX = -trackIndex * getSliderWidth();
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${targetX}px)`;
            currentTrackIndex = trackIndex; 
        }

        function handleInfiniteLoop() {
            let targetRealPageIndex;

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = actualPagesCount - 1;
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = 0;
            } else { 
                targetRealPageIndex = currentTrackIndex - 1;
            }

            currentPageIndex = targetRealPageIndex; 
            updatePagination(); 

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) {
                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false); 
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            }
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) { 
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return; 
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return; 
            
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true); 
        }

        function updatePagination() {
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 || !paginationActiveBarEl) return; 
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount; 
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100; 
            
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none'; 
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-dragging'); 
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || !sliderTrackEl) return; 
            e.preventDefault(); 
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`; 
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.remove('about-page-slider-dragging'); 
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out'; 

            const diffX = currentX - startX;

            if (Math.abs(diffX) > dragThreshold) { 
                if (diffX < 0) { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + 1, true);
                } else { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex - 1, true);
                }
            } else { 
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function attachEventListeners() {
            console.log("AboutPageSlider: Anexando event listeners.");
            if (sliderTrackEl) { 
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);
            } else {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider: Não foi possível anexar 'transitionend': sliderTrackEl não encontrado.");
            }

            if (sliderContentEl) { 
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
            } else {
                 console.error("AboutPageSlider: Não foi possível anexar listeners de drag: sliderContentEl não encontrado.");
            }
            // Listeners de mousemove e mouseup/touchend no document para melhor experiência
            // Estes podem ser anexados mesmo se sliderContentEl não for encontrado, pois não dependem dele diretamente
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { 
                if (isDragging) handleDragEnd();
            });
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);

            if (paginationSegmentsClickable && paginationSegmentsClickable.length > 0) {
                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const segmentIndex = parseInt(segment.dataset.pageSegment);
                        let pageIndexToNavigate;

                        if (isMobileView()) {
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.floor((actualPagesCount - 1) / 2); 
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount - 1; 
                        } else {
                            pageIndexToNavigate = segmentIndex; 
                        }
                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);
                    });
                });
            } else {
                 console.warn("AboutPageSlider: Nenhum .about-page-pagination-segment-clickable encontrado para anexar listeners de clique.");
            }
            
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
                if (currentIsMobile !== previousIsMobile) {
                    console.log("AboutPageSlider: Mudança de visualização detectada (mobile/desktop), reconfigurando o slider.");
                    setupSlider(); // Re-setup completo se o tipo de visualização mudar
                } else {
                    // Apenas ajusta larguras se o tipo de visualização não mudou
                    if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
                    const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-page'); 
                    const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
                    pages.forEach(page => {
                        page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
                    });
                    goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
                    updatePagination(); 
                }
            });
            console.log("AboutPageSlider: Event listeners anexados.");
        }

        // Usar addEventListener para 'load' é geralmente mais seguro do que atribuir window.onload diretamente
        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })(); // Fim da IIFE
    </script>


<script>
        // IIFE to encapsulate
        (function() {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.quote-slide');
                const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.pagination-dot');
                let currentSlideIndex = 0;

                if (slides.length === 0 || dots.length === 0 || slides.length !== dots.length) {

<script>
        // IIFE para encapsular
        (function() {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                const listItems = document.querySelectorAll('.expandable-list .list-item');
                const imageDisplay = document.getElementById('image-display');
                let activeItem = null;

                if (listItems.length === 0 || !imageDisplay) {
                    console.error("Elementos da lista ou display de imagem não encontrados.");
                    return;
                }

                // Função para calcular e definir a posição/altura do indicador
                function positionIndicator(item) {
                    const indicator = item.querySelector('.item-indicator');
                    const contentWrapper = item.querySelector('.item-content-wrapper');
                    const header = item.querySelector('.item-header');
                    const description = item.querySelector('.item-description');

                    if (!indicator || !contentWrapper || !header || !description) return;

                    // Posição do topo do header RELATIVA AO list-item
                    const headerTopRelativeToListItem = contentWrapper.offsetTop + header.offsetTop;

                    // Calcula a altura do conteúdo visível
                    let contentHeight = header.offsetHeight;
                    if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
                        const descMarginTop = parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(description).marginTop) || 0;
                        // Usa scrollHeight para altura real da descrição
                        contentHeight += descMarginTop + description.scrollHeight;
                    } else {
                         // Se inativo, a altura deve ser zero para o cálculo do indicador
                         contentHeight = 0; // Garante que indicador inativo tenha altura 0 no cálculo
                    }

                    // Aplica os estilos ao indicador
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        indicator.style.top = `${headerTopRelativeToListItem}px`;
                        // Define altura zero se não estiver ativo, caso contrário usa a calculada
                        indicator.style.height = item.classList.contains('active') ? `${Math.max(0, contentHeight)}px` : '0px';
                    });
                }

                // Função para trocar imagem com fade
                function changeImageWithFade(imageUrl) {
                     if (!imageDisplay) return;
                     imageDisplay.style.setProperty('--bg-image-before', `url('${imageUrl}')`);
                     imageDisplay.classList.add('fade-in');
                     setTimeout(() => {
                         imageDisplay.style.backgroundImage = `url('${imageUrl}')`;
                         imageDisplay.classList.remove('fade-in');
                         imageDisplay.style.removeProperty('--bg-image-before');
                     }, 800);
                 }
                 imageDisplay.style.setProperty('--bg-image-before', 'none');


                function setActiveItem(clickedItem) {
                    if (clickedItem === activeItem) return;

                    // Desativa o item anterior
                    if (activeItem) {
                        const oldDesc = activeItem.querySelector('.item-description');
                        activeItem.classList.remove('active'); // Remove classe do LI
                        if (oldDesc) {
                            oldDesc.style.maxHeight = '0px';
                            oldDesc.style.marginTop = '0px';
                        }
                         // Reseta explicitamente a altura do indicador antigo
                         const oldIndicator = activeItem.querySelector('.item-indicator');
                         if (oldIndicator) oldIndicator.style.height = '0px';
                    }

                    // Ativa o novo item
                    const newDesc = clickedItem.querySelector('.item-description');
                    clickedItem.classList.add('active'); // Adiciona classe ao LI
                    if (newDesc) {
                        newDesc.style.marginTop = '0.5rem';
                        // Define max-height para animar abertura
                         requestAnimationFrame(() => { // Garante cálculo após DOM update
                             newDesc.style.maxHeight = newDesc.scrollHeight + "px";
                             // Posiciona o indicador APÓS definir maxHeight
                             positionIndicator(clickedItem); // Chama para definir altura e top
                         });
                    } else {
                        // Se não houver descrição, posiciona baseado só no header
                        positionIndicator(clickedItem);
                    }

                    activeItem = clickedItem; // Atualiza referência

                    // Atualiza imagem
                    const imageSrc = clickedItem.getAttribute('data-image');
                    if (imageSrc) {
                        changeImageWithFade(imageSrc);
                    }
                }

                // Adiciona listeners de clique
                listItems.forEach(item => {
                    item.addEventListener('click', () => { // Listener no LI
                        setActiveItem(item);
                    });

                    // Listener para ajustar indicador após transição da descrição
                    const description = item.querySelector('.item-description');
                     if (description) {
                         description.addEventListener('transitionend', (event) => {
                             if (event.propertyName === 'max-height' && item.classList.contains('active')) {
                                 // Recalcula altura/posição do indicador após animação
                                 positionIndicator(item);
                             }
                         });
                     }
                });

                // Ativa o primeiro item inicialmente
                if (listItems.length > 0) {
                    const firstItem = listItems[0];
                    const initialImageSrc = firstItem.getAttribute('data-image');

                    if (initialImageSrc && imageDisplay) {
                        imageDisplay.style.backgroundImage = `url('${initialImageSrc}')`;
                    }
                    // Usa a função setActiveItem para inicializar corretamente
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        setActiveItem(firstItem);
                    }, 50);
                }

                 // Reposiciona indicador no resize
                 window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                     if (activeItem) {
                         setTimeout(() => positionIndicator(activeItem), 100);
                     }
                 });

            });
        })();
    </script>


<script>
// IIFE para encapsular
(function() {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
        const paginationItems = document.querySelectorAll('.pagination-item');
        const paginationBarContainer = document.querySelector('.pagination-bar-container');

        let paginationIndicator = document.querySelector('.pagination-indicator');
        if (!paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
            console.log("Slider principal: Criando o elemento '.pagination-indicator' dinamicamente.");
            paginationIndicator = document.createElement('div');
            paginationIndicator.classList.add('pagination-indicator');
            paginationBarContainer.appendChild(paginationIndicator);
        }

        if (slides.length === 0 || paginationItems.length === 0 || slides.length !== paginationItems.length) {
            console.error("Slider principal: Número de slides e itens de paginação não correspondem ou elementos não encontrados. Verifique as classes '.slide' e '.pagination-item'.");
            return;
        }
        if (!paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) { // Verificação ajustada: só erro se o container existe mas o indicador não pôde ser criado/achado
            console.error("Slider principal: Elemento '.pagination-indicator' não pôde ser encontrado ou criado.");
            // Não retorna aqui, pois o indicador pode ser opcional para a funcionalidade básica se o CSS o esconder
        }
        if (!paginationBarContainer) {
            console.error("Slider principal: Elemento '.pagination-bar-container' não encontrado. O indicador não pode ser posicionado e o scrollIntoView não funcionará como esperado.");
            // Considerar retornar se paginationBarContainer é essencial para outras funcionalidades além do indicador
        }

        // Função para atualizar o slide ativo, item de paginação ativo e indicador
        // Adicionamos o parâmetro 'isInitialLoad' com valor padrão 'false'
        function goToSlide(index, isInitialLoad = false) {
            if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) {
                console.error("Índice do slide fora dos limites:", index);
                return;
            }

            const currentActiveSlide = document.querySelector('.slide.active-slide');
            const currentActivePaginationItem = document.querySelector('.pagination-item.active-pagination-item');
            if (currentActiveSlide) {
                currentActiveSlide.classList.remove('active-slide');
            }
            if (currentActivePaginationItem) {
                currentActivePaginationItem.classList.remove('active-pagination-item');
            }

            slides[index].classList.add('active-slide');
            paginationItems[index].classList.add('active-pagination-item');

            if (paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[index];
                const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;

                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                    const indicatorWidth = targetPaginationItem.offsetWidth;
                    if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                        paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                        paginationIndicator.style.width = `${indicatorWidth}px`;
                    }
                });

                // MODIFICAÇÃO AQUI:
                // Só executa scrollIntoView se NÃO for a carga inicial
                if (!isInitialLoad) {
                    targetPaginationItem.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', inline: 'center', block: 'nearest' });
                }
            }
        }

        paginationItems.forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('mouseover', () => {
                const slideIndex = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-slide-index'), 10);
                if (!isNaN(slideIndex)) {
                    goToSlide(slideIndex); // Chamada normal, isInitialLoad será false por padrão
                } else {
                    console.error("Atributo 'data-slide-index' não encontrado ou inválido no item:", item);
                }
            });

            item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const slideIndex = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-slide-index'), 10);
                if (!isNaN(slideIndex)) {
                    goToSlide(slideIndex); // Chamada normal, isInitialLoad será false por padrão
                } else {
                    console.error("Atributo 'data-slide-index' não encontrado ou inválido no item:", item);
                }
            });
        });

        setTimeout(() => {
            // MODIFICAÇÃO AQUI: Passamos 'true' para isInitialLoad
            goToSlide(0, true);
        }, 100);


        let resizeTimeout;
        window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
            clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
            resizeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                const currentActiveIndex = Array.from(paginationItems).findIndex(item => item.classList.contains('active-pagination-item'));
                if (currentActiveIndex !== -1 && paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                    const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[currentActiveIndex];
                    const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                            const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                            const indicatorWidth = targetPaginationItem.offsetWidth;
                            paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                            paginationIndicator.style.width = `${indicatorWidth}px`;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }, 250);
        });

        if (paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
            let scrollTimeout;
            paginationBarContainer.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
                clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
                scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    const currentActiveIndex = Array.from(paginationItems).findIndex(item => item.classList.contains('active-pagination-item'));
                    if (currentActiveIndex !== -1) {
                        const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[currentActiveIndex];
                        const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;
                        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                            if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                                const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                                paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }, 150);
            }, { passive: true });
        }
    });
})();
</script>


<script>
  // IIFE para encapsular o código e evitar conflitos globais
  (function() {
    // Espera o HTML carregar
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
      const divider = document.getElementById('scroll-divider');

      // Verifica se o elemento divisor existe
      if (!divider) {
        console.error("Elemento divisor (#scroll-divider) não encontrado. Verifique o ID no HTML.");
        return; // Interrompe se não encontrar
      }

      let startTime = null; // Para rastrear o tempo da animação
      const animationDuration = 3000; // Duração de um ciclo COMPLETO (ida e volta) em ms (ex: 3 segundos)
      const mainColor = '#7735fc';      // Cor principal/escura
      const highlightColor = '#ba97fc'; // Cor clara que vai se mover
      // *** AUMENTADO O TAMANHO DA FAIXA ***
      const bandWidthPercent = 90;      // Largura da faixa clara em porcentagem (ex: 70% - bem maior)

      // Função que será chamada repetidamente para animar
      const animateDivider = (timestamp) => {
        // Garante que o divisor ainda existe no DOM
        if (!document.body.contains(divider)) {
            console.log("Elemento divisor removido do DOM, parando a animação.");
            return;
        }

        if (!startTime) {
          startTime = timestamp; // Define o tempo inicial na primeira execução
        }

        const elapsedTime = timestamp - startTime;
        // Calcula o progresso dentro de um ciclo (0 a 1)
        const progressRaw = (elapsedTime % animationDuration) / animationDuration;

        // --- Lógica de Animação Modificada (Ping-Pong) ---

        // Usa cosseno para criar um movimento suave de ida e volta (0 -> 1 -> 0)
        // Math.cos(progressRaw * Math.PI * 2) vai de 1 a -1 e volta a 1.
        // (1 - cos) / 2 mapeia isso para o intervalo 0 a 1 e volta a 0.
        const angle = progressRaw * Math.PI * 2; // Ângulo para um ciclo completo (0 a 2*PI)
        const pingPongProgress = (1 - Math.cos(angle)) / 2; // Valor oscilante entre 0 e 1

        // Calcula a posição central da faixa clara (0% a 100%) com base no progresso oscilante
        const centerPercent = pingPongProgress * 100;

        // Calcula as posições de início e fim da transição para a cor clara
        // Garante que as posições fiquem dentro de 0 e 100
        const startHighlight = Math.max(0, centerPercent - bandWidthPercent / 2);
        const endHighlight = Math.min(100, centerPercent + bandWidthPercent / 2);

        // Define o gradiente para ir de cima para baixo ('to bottom')
        divider.style.background = `linear-gradient(to bottom,
          ${mainColor} 0%,
          ${mainColor} ${startHighlight}%,
          ${highlightColor} ${centerPercent}%,
          ${mainColor} ${endHighlight}%,
          ${mainColor} 100%
        )`;
        // --- Fim da Lógica Modificada ---

        // Solicita o próximo quadro da animação, criando o loop
        requestAnimationFrame(animateDivider);
      };

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Seleciona o botão de fechar
    const closeButton = document.getElementById('close-business-bar');
    // Seleciona o wrapper da barra de negócios
    const businessBarWrapper = document.getElementById('business-bar-wrapper');
    // Seleciona o corpo do documento
    const bodyElement = document.body;

    // Verifica se ambos os elementos existem para evitar erros
    if (closeButton && businessBarWrapper && bodyElement) {
        closeButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
            // Adiciona a classe 'hidden' ao wrapper da barra para escondê-la
            businessBarWrapper.classList.add('hidden');
            
            // Adiciona a classe 'business-bar-hidden' ao body para ajustar o header
            bodyElement.classList.add('business-bar-hidden');
            
            // Opcional: Log para confirmar que o evento ocorreu (bom para debug)
            // console.log('Business bar fechada!');
        });
    } else {
        if (!closeButton) {
            console.error('Botão #close-business-bar não encontrado.');
        }
        if (!businessBarWrapper) {
            console.error('Elemento #business-bar-wrapper não encontrado.');
        }
    }
});
</script>

  <div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content=""><p class="" style="white-space:pre-wrap;">PALO ALTO, Calif. – [FEBRUARY 26, 2025] – PsiQuantum today announces Omega, a quantum photonic chipset purpose-built for utility-scale quantum computing. Featured in a newly published paper in<em> </em><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-08820-7"><em>Nature</em></a>, the chipset contains all the advanced components required to build million-qubit-scale quantum computers and deliver on the profoundly world-changing promise of this technology<em>. </em>Every photonic component is demonstrated with beyond-state-of-the-art performance. The paper shows high-fidelity qubit operations, and a simple, long-range chip-to-chip qubit interconnect – a key enabler to scale that has remained challenging for other technologies. The chips are made in a high-volume semiconductor fab, representing a new level of technical maturity and scale in a field that is often thought of as being confined to research labs. PsiQuantum will break ground this year on two datacenter-sized Quantum Compute Centers in Brisbane, Australia and Chicago, Illinois.</p></div>

  <blockquote data-animation-role="quote">
    <span>“</span>For more than 25 years it has been my conviction that in order for us to realize a useful quantum computer in my lifetime, we must find a way to fully leverage the unmatched capabilities of the semiconductor industry. This paper vindicates that belief.<span>”</span>
  </blockquote>
  <figcaption class="source">— Prof. Jeremy O’Brien, PsiQuantum Co-founder & CEO. </figcaption>

    }</style>
</figure></div></div><div class="sqs-block website-component-block sqs-block-website-component sqs-block-html html-block" data-block-css="["https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/fa064889-35e4-452f-a442-609281306ad6_586/website.components.html.styles.css"]" data-block-scripts="["https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/fa064889-35e4-452f-a442-609281306ad6_586/website.components.html.visitor.js"]" data-block-type="1337" data-definition-name="website.components.html" data-sqsp-block="text" data-website-component-id="yui_3_17_2_1_1740524329102_15397" id="block-yui_3_17_2_1_1740524329102_15397"><div class="sqs-block-content"><div class="sqs-text-block-container">
  
  <div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content=""><p class="" style="white-space:pre-wrap;">Designed by PsiQuantum and manufactured at GlobalFoundries in New York, the new chipset integrates these advances into high-volume, industrially-proven processes – ready for large-scale systems integration. PsiQuantum’s approach is based on using single photons – particles of light – which are then manipulated using silicon photonic chip technology originally developed for telecom and datacenter networking applications. For quantum applications, the company had to improve performance well beyond the state-of-the-art, and introduced new materials into the fab, including a superconducting material used for highly efficient single-photon detection, and Barium Titanate (BTO), an advanced material for low-loss, high speed optical switching which is developed and produced by PsiQuantum in San Jose, California. The company also had to overcome challenges with background noise and low-temperature operation of the chip to demonstrate the circuit performance detailed in the paper – PsiQuantum’s latest measurements include 99.98% single-qubit state preparation and measurement fidelity, 99.5% two-photon quantum interference visibility, and 99.72% chip-to-chip quantum interconnect fidelity.  </p><p class="" style="white-space:pre-wrap;">PsiQuantum’s founding team performed the world’s first lab demonstration of a two-qubit logic gate using single photons in Brisbane, Australia over 20 years ago, invented integrated quantum photonics and ‘fusion-based’ quantum computing, and <a href="https://www.bristol.ac.uk/news/2013/9720.html">made a prototype quantum processor available via the cloud</a> in 2013. Since then, the team has focused exclusively on the scaling, performance and manufacturing challenges associated with building million-qubit-scale systems essential for commercially valuable applications. </p></div>

  <div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content=""><p class="" style="white-space:pre-wrap;">PsiQuantum has also introduced an entirely new cooling solution for quantum computers—eliminating the iconic “chandelier” dilution refrigerator in favor of a simpler, more powerful, and more manufacturable cuboid design, closer to a datacenter server rack. The <em>Nature</em> paper shares some details on this new approach to cooling, which is now deployed at PsiQuantum’s UK facility and was used for many of the performance results described.</p><p class="" style="white-space:pre-wrap;">Thanks to these advancements, PsiQuantum now has the technology to manufacture and cool vast numbers of quantum chips. While the company must continue to improve the performance, integration and yield of the devices, there is no “next step” in terms of manufacturing maturity — GlobalFoundries is a “tier-1” fab. PsiQuantum has characterized millions of devices on thousands of wafers and currently performs around half a million measurements each month.</p></div>

  <div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content=""><p class="" style="white-space:pre-wrap;">PsiQuantum’s focus is now on wiring these chips together across racks, into increasingly large-scale multi-chip systems – work the company is now expanding through its partnership with the <a href="/news-import/psiquantum-partners-with-us-department-of-energys-slac-national-accelerator-laboratory-to-access-state-of-the-art-high-powered-cryogenic-cooling-capabilities-for-large-scale-quantum-computing">U.S. Department of Energy at SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory</a> in Menlo Park, California as well as a new manufacturing and testing facility in Silicon Valley. While chip-to-chip networking remains a hard research problem for many other approaches, photonic quantum computers have the intrinsic advantage that photonic qubits can be networked using standard telecom optical fiber without any conversion between modalities, and PsiQuantum has already demonstrated high-fidelity quantum interconnects over distances up to 250m.</p><p class="" style="white-space:pre-wrap;"> In 2024, PsiQuantum announced two landmark partnerships with the <a href="/news-import/psiquantum-to-build-worlds-first-utility-scale-fault-tolerant-quantum-computer-in-australia" target="">Australian Federal and Queensland State governments</a>, as well as <a href="/news-import/illinois-iqmp">the State of Illinois and the City of Chicago</a>, to build its first utility-scale quantum computers in Brisbane and Chicago. Recognizing quantum as a sovereign capability, these partnerships underscore the urgency and race towards building million-qubit systems. Later this year, PsiQuantum will break ground on Quantum Compute Centers at both sites, where the first utility-scale, million-qubit systems will be deployed.</p></div>
